__comment: Role-to-preset bindings for delegated agents. Seeded automatically on first install — edit via /mixdog:config or directly in the data directory. Preset names must match a 'name' field in agent-config.json.

roles.__comment: Code implementation role. Runs with high reasoning effort to handle complex edits.
roles.name: worker

roles.__comment: Code review role. Uses the highest-quality model for accurate critique.
roles.name: reviewer

roles.__comment: Bug investigation role. Uses the highest-quality model for deep root-cause analysis.
roles.name: debugger

roles.__comment: Test execution and verification role. High-effort Sonnet balances speed and accuracy.
roles.name: tester
